title: Chapter 2178
content:
﻿Chapter 2178 Chapter 1020: Ao Zhan_4

The spiritual power is low, couldn't outlast others.

The movement technique is good, but it's utterly useless.

Low-level spells, only make others nauseous.

Severely lacking in combat ability.

Once teammates fail, he's completely a "waste."

Facing the spell bombardment from Wanxiao Sect's five elite spiritual cultivators, Mo Hua couldn't contribute even a bit.

This seemingly winnable match was ultimately lost.

Many people's hopes were truly extinguished.

Especially those who had previously placed their hopes in Taixu Gate, felt even more frustrated, lamenting its weakness, angered by its lack of progress.

"It's one thing for the top talents to lose, but even a first-class team from the Four Great Sects lost."

"Is the gap between the Eight Great Gates and the Four Great Sects really that big?"

"What could they do with someone like Mo Hua?"

"In the end, he can only nauseate people; in this true battle of top talents, he really can't help at all..."

"The movement technique might be okay, but if it can't kill, what's the use?"

"In the end, just a low-level spiritual cultivator."

"No matter how well low-level spells are used, they remain low-level."

"And, the spiritual power is too low...

"His tricks can only 'get by on luck, already thoroughly studied by the Xuan Character Bureau, they're useless now, completely wasted..."

"At this rate, his team won't get far."

"Not just his team, Taixu Gate won't get far either...

Outside the sword discussion arena, countless cultivators were voicing their opinions.

And after this round, the situation truly started to deteriorate.

Taixu Gate suffered loss after loss, with their rankings rapidly slipping, dropping straight out of the top four, falling to fifth place.

They had already fallen out of the possibility of being ranked among the "Four Great Sects."

From the current situation, they seem to have completely lost the qualification to compete for a place among the "Four Great Sects"...

Within the sect, spirits were low, morale was down.

The elders sighed and regretted.

Even the Sect Leader and several patriarchs couldn't help but sigh.

To countless sects within the Qian Learning State Boundary, being part of the "Four Great Sects" was like an unattainable dream.

Taixu Gate had once dreamed this dream.

But now, this dream had shattered without any surprise.

Of course, by now, everyone in Taixu Gate had gradually woken up, no longer hoping for anything else.

They only hoped to stabilize their current ranking and not fall any further.

Even winning just a few matches would suffice.

And this hope naturally fell onto Taixu Gate's strongest team, composed of Linghu Xiao and Mo Hua.

They eagerly hoped Mo Hua and his team could win a match.

Even if it couldn't stop the bleeding or save Taixu Gate's precarious ranking, could at least raise morale a bit.

Everyone in Taixu Gate, in their hearts, were both hopeful and tense.

They even hoped for a "soft persimmon," for Mo Hua and his team to pinch, just to accumulate some victory points.

In this tense and oppressive atmosphere, Mo Hua and his team's fourth round opponent in the Dao Discussion Heaven Instrument had been deduced.

But upon seeing it, everyone's hearts sank further.

Another team from the Four Great Sects, and still the "old friends":

Heavenly Sword Sect.

Not a soft persimmon.

Although not the strongest team led by Xiao Wuchen, it was a team led by a genius just below Xiao Wuchen of the Heavenly Sword Sect.

It was an extremely strong first-class discussion team.

Even stronger than the discussion team from Wanxiao Sect that Mo Hua and his team lost to in the previous round.

Yet this was not the most troublesome part.

The most troublesome was the discussion competition's format:

This was an attack-and-defense match.

Heavenly Sword Sect attacked, while Taixu Gate defended.

Five Heavenly Sword Sect geniuses, with strong sword qi and astonishing combat power, attacked; Taixu Gate defended.

Anyone who had watched the sword discussion matches understood.

This was almost a certain death scenario.

No chance of victory at all.

In a certain sense, the severity of this situation was no less than the match against Xiao Wuchen.

The Four Sects and Eight Gates, and many other cultivators paying attention to the Sword Discussion Conference, took one look and shook their heads, silently noting Taixu Gate's misfortune.

The cultivators concerned about Taixu Gate truly felt a bit heartbroken this time.

Only Mo Hua, watching the list of sword discussions, had eyes becoming brighter, even curling an unnoticed slight smile at the corner of his mouth...
